sources.quotedText: {"gaz_id":231428,"gaz_name":"Redwood Creek","gaz_featureclass":"Stream","fcode":46000,"state_alpha":"CA","county_name":"Marin"}; geometry multipoint, first point (Web Mercator -13645294.7885, 4559618.6053) converts to lon -122.577769, lat 37.859654, at the creek's mouth/tidewater outlet at Muir Beach; ~244m from the file's recorded coordinate (-122.5750, 37.8595) — within tolerance, coordinate confirmed.

parameters.note: Redwood Creek (Muir Woods/Muir Beach, Marin Co.) and its tidewaters/lagoon are closed to all fishing year-round. The creek supports the federally endangered Central California Coast coho salmon ESU and threatened steelhead, which have never been stocked here.

regulations.humanSummary: Redwood Creek and its tidewaters (Marin Co.) are closed to all fishing all year.
regulations.verbatimText: Redwood Creek and tidewaters (Marin Co.). Closed to all fishing all year.

parameters.note: Anglers 16 years of age or older must have a valid California sport fishing license. This water is closed to all fishing all year, so the license requirement is moot here, but is included for statewide-standard completeness.

regulations.humanSummary: California sport fishing license required for anglers 16+
regulations.verbatimText: Except as otherwise provided in this article, every person 16 years of age or older who takes any fish, reptile, or amphibian for any purpose other than profit shall first obtain a valid license for that purpose...
